taskTemplate.name: Document Receipt
taskTemplate.description: Receive and confirm executed closing documents from settlement

subTaskTemplate.name: E-Sign Documents
subTaskTemplate.description: E-Sign Documents – E-signed closing documents received; this subtask auto-completes when the applicable e-signed documents are received.

subTaskTemplate.name: Wet Sign Documents
subTaskTemplate.description: Wet Sign Documents – Wet-signed closing documents received; this subtask auto-completes when the applicable wet-signed documents are received.
